metadata.name: Analyze Response Time for Emergency Services

description: A fire chief wants a report on the department's average response time over the last year to see if they are meeting their goals.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all fire department dispatch and arrival time data for the last 12 months.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully queries the emergency dispatch database.

nodes.task_description: For each incident, calculate the response time (time from dispatch to arrival on scene).

expected_outcome.value: The system calculates the response time for thousands of incidents.

nodes.task_description: Generate a report showing the average response time by month and by station, and compare it to the department's 6-minute goal.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a detailed performance report for the fire chief.
